queries.question: Please provide the technique name that is common for all makeup artists.
queries.sql: SELECT Techniques.name  from Artist_Techniques join Techniques on Artist_Techniques.technique_id = Techniques.technique_id join Makeup_Artists on Artist_Techniques.artist_id = Makeup_Artists.artist_id   GROUP BY Artist_Techniques.technique_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Artist_Techniques.artist_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Makeup_Artists)

queries.question: For each makeup artist, what are the respective names of their techniques?
queries.sql: select makeup_artists.full_name , techniques.name from Artist_Techniques join Techniques on Artist_Techniques.technique_id = Techniques.technique_id join Makeup_Artists on Artist_Techniques.artist_id = Makeup_Artists.artist_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name ?name WHERE {
  ?artist_techniques a :Artist_Techniques .
  ?techniques a :Techniques .
  ?artist_techniques p:hasTechniques ?techniques .
  ?makeup_artists a :Makeup_Artists .
  ?artist_techniques p:hasMakeup_Artists ?makeup_artists .
  ?makeup_artists p:name ?full_name .
  ?techniques p:name ?name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What technique names are associated with each makeup artist?
